title: Franky Is Crushed by the Sea Train
main_description: Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
key_events: Franky Is Crushed by the Sea Train
Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
